list.name: service
list.label: Service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT service FROM metrics ORDER BY service

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', t.timestamp) AS time,
       avg(t.total) AS throughput
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp, sum(value) AS total
  FROM metrics
  WHERE metric = 'http_requests_total'
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY timestamp
) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', t.timestamp) AS time,
       avg(t.err) / NULLIF(avg(t.req), 0) AS error_rate
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp,
         sum(CASE WHEN metric = 'http_errors_total' THEN value END) AS err,
         sum(CASE WHEN metric = 'http_requests_total' THEN value END) AS req
  FROM metrics
  WHERE metric IN ('http_errors_total', 'http_requests_total')
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY timestamp
) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT avg(value) AS avg_cpu FROM metrics WHERE metric = 'cpu_usage_percent'
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

SELECT avg(value) AS avg_memory FROM metrics WHERE metric = 'memory_usage_bytes'
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', t.timestamp) AS time,
       avg(t.total) AS throughput
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp, sum(value) AS total
  FROM metrics
  WHERE metric = 'http_requests_total'
    AND service = '$service'
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY timestamp
) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', timestamp) AS time,
       avg(value) AS p99_latency
FROM metrics WHERE metric = 'http_request_duration_seconds_p99'
  AND service = '$service'
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', t.timestamp) AS time,
       t.service,
       avg(t.err) / NULLIF(avg(t.req), 0) AS error_rate
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp, service,
         sum(CASE WHEN metric = 'http_errors_total' THEN value END) AS err,
         sum(CASE WHEN metric = 'http_requests_total' THEN value END) AS req
  FROM metrics
  WHERE metric IN ('http_errors_total', 'http_requests_total')
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY timestamp, service
) t GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', timestamp) AS time,
       host,
       avg(value) AS cpu
FROM metrics WHERE metric = 'cpu_usage_percent'
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: P50 Latency by Service and Host

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', timestamp) AS time,
       service,
       host,
       avg(value) AS p50_latency
FROM metrics WHERE metric = 'http_request_duration_seconds_p50'
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY 1, 2, 3

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', t.timestamp) AS time,
       t.service,
       avg(t.total) AS throughput
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp, service, sum(value) AS total
  FROM metrics
  WHERE metric = 'http_requests_total'
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY timestamp, service
) t GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', t.timestamp) AS time,
       t.host,
       avg(t.total) AS errors
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp, host, sum(value) AS total
  FROM metrics
  WHERE metric = 'http_errors_total'
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY timestamp, host
) t GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', timestamp) AS time,
       service,
       avg(value) AS p99_latency
FROM metrics WHERE metric = 'http_request_duration_seconds_p99'
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT max(value) AS peak_cpu FROM metrics WHERE metric = 'cpu_usage_percent'
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

SELECT avg(value) AS avg_latency FROM metrics WHERE metric = 'http_request_duration_seconds_p50'
  AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

SELECT time_bucket('$__interval', t.timestamp) AS time,
       avg(t.total) AS throughput
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp, sum(value) AS total
  FROM metrics
  WHERE metric = 'http_requests_total'
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY timestamp
) t GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', t.timestamp) AS time,
       t.service,
       t.metric,
       avg(t.total) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp, service, metric, sum(value) AS total
  FROM metrics
  WHERE metric IN ('http_requests_total', 'http_errors_total')
    AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  GROUP BY timestamp, service, metric
) t GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY 1, 2, 3
